title: Scientists Reversed Brain Aging With a Nasal Spray. Alzheimer's Is Next.
script: Texas A&M University just reversed brain aging — in mice — with a simple nasal spray. Researchers developed a spray using microscopic particles from neural stem cells. When given to 18-month-old mice — equivalent to 60-year-old humans — it reduced brain inflammation, restored memory, and produced benefits lasting months from just 2 doses. The team is now filing a patent. A human version is the next step. Alzheimer's may have met its match.
